description: Controlled paraphrases of the 52 canonical NL2Spatial questions. 4 variants each: casual, formal, reworded, terse.

variants: what data do we have?
Could you list all available datasets in the system?
show me what tables exist
list all data
what schemas are in the catalog?
Please enumerate all available namespaces
show me the namespaces
list schemas
what columns does the buildings table have?
Can you describe the structure of the buildings dataset?
what are the columns in the buildings table?
describe the buildings table columns
which datasets are spatial?
List all tables that contain geometry data
show me tables with geom columns
find spatial tables
any tables with a population field?
Which datasets contain a population column?
do we have population data in any table?
find tables with population
got any road or transport data?
Search for datasets pertaining to transportation infrastructure
find tables about transport
search for road data
what fields are in the places table?
Please describe the column schema of the places dataset
show columns for places
list places table fields
give me a preview of buildings
Could you show a few sample rows from the buildings table?
sample the buildings data
preview buildings
how many rows in land_use?

how many records in the land_use table?
land_use row count

Provide a statistical summary of the buildings dataset
summarize the buildings table
buildings stats

show geometry types for transportation
transportation geometry types

show me the extent of places
places bounding box

show the bounding box of the buildings table
buildings extent

get buildings with class school
filter buildings to class = school

land_use zones at point 2.35, 48.86
what zone contains lon 2.35 lat 48.86?

Provide a list of buildings within an 800 meter radius of downtown, sorted by proximity
show buildings within 800 meters of downtown sorted by how close they are
